kitDescription: Marciana: Marine Study is an Iron AR Burst III Attacker built around 'Whistle' stacks: she opens battle with 4 stacks (of a 5-stack cap), each granting a continuous self ATK buff, and reaches the cap a few seconds in. When she enters Full Burst AFTER casting her own Burst, she strikes the highest-Max-HP enemy for a large 3789.25%-of-ATK bonus hit and flags it. Her Burst buffs her own Attack Damage and (when elementally advantaged) Elemental-Advantage damage, and brands Electric-Code enemies as 'High-Risk Targets' with reduced DEF; once a target is High-Risk, every 20 normal hits adds a 152.68% strike. A large part of her kit is wave-clear flavor — a spread nuke on enemy-kill and a 214.36% Penguin Emergency Dispatch that needs 6+ Raptures — all of which lies dormant against a single immortal raid boss.

redAssertions: CAVEAT (infra, not model): the S5 blind test file assumes a SIDE-EFFECTING withPatchedOverride (`withPatchedOverride(...) && controlComp(...)` / comma-operator patterns), whereas the harness's withPatchedOverride RETURNS a patched-override clone passed via the `overrides` field. Run literally unmodified, S5's counterfactual runs would silently use the BASE override, so its delta assertions would false-RED — a RECON_ERROR in the blind writer's harness-API assumption, NOT a divergence in the driver's model. Corrected for that API misuse, S5's intent matches the driver's shipped override on every load-bearing line (ownBurstGate:'cast', High-Risk status gate, self-scoped Whistle, elemAdvantage inertness on a neutral boss, burst self-buffs). The driver's own 14 tests use the correct API and are GREEN (S2d-verified).

skill1.driverSaid: fullBurstEnter + ownBurstGate:'cast' -> enemy flatDamage 3789.25 (+ targetStatus 'Flagged Target' 10s for completeness)
skill1.blindSaid: S5/S6/S2b all: fullBurstEnter + ownBurstGate:'cast' (the canonical own-burst phrasing, NOT plain fullBurstEnter, NOT burstCast)
skill1.formulaCheck: skill '% of final ATK' rider: crit-eligible, no core, takes +50% FB major by FB-entry timing; RIDERCRIT engine default (landed ON) supplies crit without an explicit field.
skill1.explanation: Highest-leverage trap handled correctly. Driver's M1 pins nuke count === her burstCast count (not total FB count) and inFullBurst=true, with counterfactuals for burstCast-keying and gate removal. Modeling 'Flagged Target' as a targetStatus is harmless completeness (no consumer reads it).

skill1.driverSaid: inert (boss ATK irrelevant); status window modeled, debuff content unmodeled
skill1.formulaCheck: boss ATK debuff has zero effect on outgoing damage in v1.

skill1.driverSaid: UNMODELED — no enemyNeutralized trigger; boss never dies
skill1.formulaCheck: unreachable vs single immortal partless boss.
skill1.explanation: Correctly unmodeled and verbatim-documented; nuke count stays == burst count.

skill1.driverSaid: hitCount:20 + requiresTargetStatus:'High-Risk Target' -> flatDamage 152.68; CAVEAT: hitCount counts ALL hits, not normal-only
skill1.blindSaid: S2b/S5/S6: hitCount:20 gated on 'High-Risk Target' (Electric-only), inert on non-Electric boss
skill1.formulaCheck: kit says 'landing 20 NORMAL attacks'; engine hitCount:20 counts all hits (normal+skill+burst). Small over-count for an AR with rare procs; and the whole block is Electric-only so it never fires on the graded Fire comp.
skill1.explanation: Status-gate is correct and the biggest over-credit risk (ungated firing vs any boss) is avoided. The normal-only vs all-hit fidelity gap is openly documented → DOCUMENTED_GAP tier, not a silent divergence.

skill2.driverSaid: resource whistle initial:4 max:5; passive perResource atkPct mult 32.73 (4 stacks=130.92% at t0)
skill2.blindSaid: S2b: START 4 stacks (130.92%), 5th at t~5s; S6 authored flat 163.65% cap (less faithful)
skill2.formulaCheck: ATK% bucket; per-stack 32.73, cap 5. Opening at 4 stacks is the kit-stated start.
skill2.explanation: Driver's perResource ramp is MORE faithful than the S6 blind flat-cap authoring — it opens at 130.92% and reaches 163.65% at t=5s. M3 discriminates ramp vs flat via baseAtk step.

skill2.driverSaid: interval:5 resource+1 (always true vs 1 boss -> 5th stack at t=5s)
skill2.blindSaid: S2b/S5: statically-true 5s accrual -> caps at 5; do NOT model live Rapture counting
skill2.formulaCheck: condition statically true in scope-lock; degenerates to +1/5s to cap.
skill2.explanation: Correct static resolution; documented as enemy-count-gated in reality.

skill2.driverSaid: UNMODELED — never >=6 enemies; Whistle never drains
skill2.formulaCheck: unreachable; correctly leaves Whistle monotone non-decreasing.
skill2.explanation: Correctly unmodeled; also correctly reasons the spend never erodes the pool.

skill2.blindSaid: S2b/S5/S6: passive elemAdvantageDamagePct, advantage-gated (NOT generic attackDamage)
skill2.formulaCheck: Damage-Up bucket, engine-gated to elemental advantage; live only vs Electric. Correct stat (not generic attackDamagePct, which would over-credit vs neutral bosses).
skill2.explanation: Correct stat and first-fire convention (boss spawn = appearance at t0). M4 discriminates passive vs interval:5.

burst.blindSaid: S2b/S5/S6 agree — advantage-gated, distinct stat from the generic sibling
burst.formulaCheck: advantage-gated Damage-Up; inert on Fire, live on Electric.
burst.explanation: Correct stat split preserved (not merged with the 27.45 generic line). M5 pins value + 10s expiry.

burst.formulaCheck: Damage-Up bucket, always live; self-scoped (not allies).
burst.explanation: The element-ungated half kept distinct; self-scoped. Correct.

burst.driverSaid: burstCast + bossElementGate:'Electric' -> enemy targetStatus 'High-Risk Target' 20s; DEF v content inert at bossDef:0 (documented)
burst.blindSaid: S2b flagged the trap: DEF v is NOT numerically damageTakenPct; boss-DEF path is an engine GAP — must NOT be silently substituted
burst.formulaCheck: status application is Electric-gated; at scope-lock bossDef:0 the DEF v is genuinely inert. Driver did NOT smuggle it in as damageTakenPct — avoided the single S2b-warned encoding trap.
burst.explanation: Status (the load-bearing gate for the 152.68 rider) is Electric-gated correctly; DEF v openly documented as inert rather than mis-encoded. M6 pins Electric-fires / Fire-does-not.

gotchas.summary: hitCount:20 counts ALL hits (normal+skill+burst), but the kit says '20 NORMAL attacks'.
gotchas.evidence: Kit: 'landing 20 normal attacks against a target in the High-Risk Target state'. Engine hitCount trigger is not normal-only. Damage-calc SSOT distinguishes normal vs skill/burst instances.
gotchas.suggestedFix: If the engine exposes a normal-attack-only hit counter, key the trigger to it; otherwise the small over-count on an AR with rare procs is acceptable and is already documented. This block is Electric-only (never fires on the graded Fire comp).

gotchas.summary: Neither flatDamage rider (3789.25 / 152.68) sets crit:true; correctness relies on the engine's RIDERCRIT default being ON.
gotchas.evidence: S6 blind writer explicitly set crit:true citing RIDERCRIT; driver omitted it on both riders. Damage-calc: skill '% of final ATK' is crit-eligible. CLAUDE.md records RIDERCRIT landed ON (A32).
gotchas.suggestedFix: Confirm the RIDERCRIT engine default applies crit to flatDamage riders (it is a landed default ON, so behavior is almost certainly correct); if for any reason a flatDamage rider does NOT inherit crit from that default, add crit:true. Owner spot-check item.

verdictRationale: GO. Every kit line is either FAITHFUL or an explicitly DOCUMENTED_GAP — there is no SILENT_DROP, no mis-routed bucket, no undocumented divergence. The three highest-leverage traps S2b named are all handled: (1) the 3789.25% nuke uses fullBurstEnter + ownBurstGate:'cast' (M1 pins nuke count == her burstCast count, inFullBurst=true, with burstCast-keying and gate-removal counterfactuals), so the two-B3 double-fire is avoided; (2) the entire Electric spine (152.68% rider, High-Risk status, both elemAdvantage lines) is correctly element/status-gated and inert on a neutral/Fire boss, exercised only via an Electric-boss unit-test arm (M6); (3) the DEF v10.56% is documented as inert at bossDef:0 rather than mis-encoded as damageTakenPct — the exact trap S2b warned of. On the Whistle stacks the driver is MORE faithful than the S6 blind writer: a perResource 4->5 ramp (M3) instead of a flat cap. Blind re-derivations converge at the model level on all load-bearing lines; the only S5 REDs stem from the blind writer assuming a side-effecting withPatchedOverride (a harness-API recon error), not from any model disagreement, and the driver's own 14 tests are GREEN with strong nearest-wrong discriminators. Same-model residuals for the owner to spot-check (all low, none blocking): (a) that flatDamage riders inherit crit from the RIDERCRIT engine default since the driver set no explicit crit:true; (b) the hitCount all-hits vs normal-only fidelity approximation (documented, Electric-only); (c) all magnitudes are DATAMINED kit-literal and unmeasured — out of scope for this gate but not yet board-validated.
